summary: Completed testing of Real-Time Log Stream feature for CSDROP Portal (Iteration 13). All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. GET /api/csdrop/logs endpoint returns logs from file with total_lines and source fields. Frontend LIVE TERMINAL shows logs with syntax highlighting (green for success, red for errors, cyan for phases, amber for warnings). STREAMING indicator appears when bot is running. Frontend polls at 1.5s interval.
passed_tests: GET /api/csdrop/logs returns expected fields (running, logs, source)
GET /api/csdrop/logs returns total_lines when file exists
Frontend: Terminal shows 'No logs yet' placeholder when empty
Frontend: STREAMING indicator visible when bot is running
Frontend: Logs display with syntax highlighting (green/red/cyan/amber)
Frontend: Boot messages visible in terminal
Frontend: Sync Session button opens modal
Frontend: Sync Session modal has Start Sync button
Frontend: Code Runner tab still works
Frontend: System Health shows 'ALL SYSTEMS GO'
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing CSDROP user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-Time Log Stream feature fully functional. Endpoint: GET /api/csdrop/logs (requires CSDROP auth, accepts ?lines=N parameter, returns {running, logs, source, total_lines}). Log file path: /app/backend/clients/csdrop/logs/current_run.log. Frontend polls at 1.5s interval via pollLogs() in BotPanel component. Syntax highlighting implemented with color coding: red for errors/banned/failed, green for sent/success/saved, cyan for phases/cycle/initialized, amber for warnings, indigo for hooks/strikes. STREAMING indicator shows green dot + 'STREAMING' text when bot is running.

syntax_highlighting.red: error, fatal, critical, banned, failed, timeout

frontend_live_terminal.placeholder_when_empty: No logs yet. Launch the bot to see output.
